splits.title: Guide Lessons for November
splits.start_boundary: py ELIZA R, SNOW » Selected A casual
splits.end_boundary: Utah and Inter-mountain region, also in all Missions

files.notes: This file contains a single Guide Lessons article for November with four lessons: Tithing (Theology and Testimony), Work and Business, Hymns by Eliza R. Snow (Literature), and Juvenile Delinquency (Social Service). The file appears to be cut off at the end, ending mid-sentence in what looks like an advertisement section.
